map_coverage: {done} yimijyi {total} yasesenguwe kugeza ubu - ahasigaye hiyongeraho umunsi kumunsi.
cur_so_far: {year} kugeza ubu (kugeza {day} {month}): {v} ° C ugereranije, {d} ° C vs 1961-1990 bivuze iminsi imwe yumwaka.
cmp_hint: Buri murongo niwo mujyi wa buri mwaka anomaly vs ibyingenzi 1961-1990, bityo ahantu hamwe nikirere gitandukanye ugereranije neza.
sum_season: Igihe cyihuta cyane hano: {season} ({v} ° C kumyaka icumi).
sum_month: Ukwezi gushyuha cyane hano: {month} ({v} ° C kumyaka icumi).
grid_alias_note: Ubushyuhe bwanditse bubarwa kuri ~ 11 km ikirere-data grid selile. {alias} isangira selile yayo na {city}, byombi rero byerekana amateka amwe 1940-yubu.
guide_body:
• Utudomo / utubari: agaciro kuri buri mwaka.
  • Umuhengeri wijimye.
  • Umurongo ucagaguye: inzira igororotse (Theil-Sen); ahahanamye ni ishusho "kuri icumi" mumigani.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Ubusobanuro bwa Mann-Kendall: niba icyerekezo ari imibare nyayo cyangwa gishobora kuba urusaku gusa (n.s. = ntabwo ari ngombwa). Ubushuhe busanzwe burahambaye cyane; imvura akenshi ntabwo.
  • Igicucu: amateka yuzuye mumyaka yose yuku kwezi.
  • Amabara ashyushye: ubushyuhe (ubukonje bwubururu → ubushyuhe butukura); soma inkingi kuva hasi kugeza hejuru kugirango urebe uko ukwezi guhinduka mumyaka.
yearly_title: Buri mwaka bivuze ubushyuhe mu myaka, {name}
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} iminsi · ubushyuhe {wy} ({wv:.1f} ° C), ubukonje bukabije {cy} ({cv:.1f} ° C)
analog_line: Kugeza 2050, ikirere cyaho gishobora kumva ko {analog} ikora muri iki gihe, ubushyuhe bwa +{d} ° C.
analog_past: Mu 1940, ikirere cyaho cyunvikana nkaho {analog} kibikora muri iki gihe, ubukonje bwa {d} ° C.
cap_yearly: Umwaka bivuze hamwe na LOESS yoroshye (yerekana kwihuta) hamwe nicyerekezo gikomeye cya Theil-Sen +akamaro
cap_anomalies: Buri mwaka ugereranije na 1961-1990 ugereranije: utubari dutukura hashyushye, ubukonje bukonje. Guhindura kuva mubururu cyane cyane umutuku ni ubushyuhe.
cap_heatmap: Ikigereranyo cya buri kwezi kuri buri mwaka nka gride y'amabara (imirongo ya 2 ° C). Soma inkingi hejuru kugirango urebe ukwezi gushyushye mumyaka mirongo.
cap_anom_heatmap: Urusobe rumwe, ariko buri kwezi bipimirwa kurwego rwarwo 1961-1990 rusanzwe, bityo rero impinduka zerekana gusa (ubushyuhe butukura kuruta ibisanzwe, ubukonje bwubururu), ibihe byigihe byakuweho.
cap_threshold: Iminsi buri mwaka hejuru ya 18 ° C (ishyushye) no munsi ya 0 ° C (gukonja). Inzira ebyiri zikomeye zambuka bisobanura iminsi yubushyuhe none iruta iminsi yubukonje.
hint: Kanda ahantu hose cyangwa ukande Esc kugirango ufunge
intro: Uburyo imijyi minini kwisi yashyushye kuva 1940: inyandiko zubushyuhe bwa buri munsi zivuye muri ERA5.
omni_ph: Shakisha umujyi, igihugu, akarere cyangwa ahantu hose
range_title: Ubushyuhe bwa buri kwezi mu myaka, {name}
cap_range: Buri kwezi min-max iringaniza mumyaka, hamwe numwaka uheruka. Ari guhobera inkombe ishyushye?
record_title: Buri kwezi wandike ubushyuhe / buri munsi ubushyuhe bwa buri munsi, {name}
cap_records: Buri kwezi ibihe byose byanditse buri munsi hejuru no hasi, hamwe numwaka ushize
cap_volatility: Ni kangahe ubushyuhe bunini umunsi-ku munsi gusimbuka bibaho buri mwaka (≥6 ° C), ubushyuhe burahinduka
cap_precip: Imvura igwa buri mwaka (imvura namazi yurubura) hamwe nicyerekezo
cap_stripes: Buri murongo ni ubushyuhe bwumwaka: ubukonje bwubururu, ubushyuhe butukura ugereranije na 1961-1990. Gutembera kuva mubururu kugera kumutuku nubushyuhe, ntakindi cyo gusoma usibye ibara.
cap_season: Uburebure bwigihe cyigihe cyo gukura ubushyuhe buri mwaka (gukoresha iminsi bivuze ko buri munsi ≥ 5 ° C): guhinga idirishya ridafite ubukonje biterwa, kuramba uko ikirere gishyuha.
dtr_ylabel: Bivuze buri munsi max - min (° C)
cap_dtr: Impuzandengo yikigereranyo hagati yumunsi muremure kandi muto. Kugabanuka urwego ni urutoki rwa parike: ijoro rishyuha vuba kuruta iminsi; kwaguka birashobora kwerekana ko byumye.
cap_seasonshift: Impuzandengo yumwaka wambere nu myaka icumi yanyuma yinyandiko. Ikinyuranyo hagati yumurongo kuri buri kwezi cyerekana ibice byumwaka bishyushye cyane (akenshi imbeho irenze icyi).
health_sub: Ukuntu ubushyuhe bugenda busobanurwa mubushuhe buzwi-, ubukonje- kandi bukabije-ibyabaye byerekana ibipimo. Imbonerahamwe yose igaragara aho amakuru akeneye arahari.
cap_degreedays: Umwaka wa buri mwaka umutwaro-wo guhumuriza: gukenera gushyuha (munsi ya 18 ° C) bigabanuka mugihe ubukonje bukenewe (hejuru ya 22 ° C) buzamuka, porokisi yo guhura nubukonje hamwe nicyifuzo gikonjesha.
cap_heatwave: Iminsi yubushyuhe: kwiruka iminsi 3 hamwe nuburebure buri munsi hejuru yaho 1961-1990 90% kwijana. Ubushuhe burambye kumanywa nubushoferi nyamukuru bwubushyuhe bukabije.
cap_tropic: Ijoro iyo hasi igumye hejuru ya 20 ° C cyangwa hejuru yayo, umubiri rero ntubone ubutabazi bwijoro, umushoferi uyobora, akenshi wirengagizwa nurupfu ruterwa nubushyuhe.
cap_coldspell: Iminsi mubukonje: kwiruka iminsi 3 hamwe munsi ya buri munsi munsi yaho 1961-1990 10% kwijana. Ubukonje bumara igihe kinini butera imitsi yimitsi nimiyoboro yubuhumekero.
cap_heavyrain: Iminsi ifite byibura mm 20 yimvura (ETCCDI R20mm), imvura itera imyuzure izana imvune, kwimurwa nindwara ziterwa namazi.
cap_heatindex: Iminsi ubushyuhe bugaragara (indangagaciro yubushyuhe, ikubye mubushuhe) igera kurwego rwubushyuhe, ibipimo rusange byubushyuhe bukoreshwa. Ukeneye imibare-yubushyuhe.
footer: Byakozwe {date} · amakuru yo muri Gufungura-Meteo gusesengura amateka (ERA5) · source kuri GitHub
